howToUse: Read this file + the in_progress phase file(s) each session. Statuses: pending | in_progress | done. Keep statuses and notes current — this plan is the source of truth, not chat history.

phases.title: Infrastructure: repo, CI, site, release pipeline
Canvas & viewport: Metal-backed view, zoom/pan, selection
Annotations & text: arrows, shapes, highlights, text blocks
Transform tools: crop UI, resize, skew
Layers UX: panel, promote-to-layer, effects, persistence
Polish: liquid glass everywhere, animations, signing, perf pass
Screenshot capture & history (user request; preempts phase 2 remainder)
